---
title: "about_page_7"
author: "Edward"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

<div style="color:green; ">
Want to Learn More?
</div>

- Read the GAM Model Building guide in the **Appendix** tab
- Explore the workflow diagram in the **About** tab
- Review the Ghana ecological zones map for regional context

<div style="color:green; ">
External Resources:
</div>

- [WHO Malaria Guidelines](https://www.who.int/health-topics/malaria)
- [Ghana Health Service](https://www.ghanahealthservice.org)
- [GAM in R Tutorial](https://noamross.github.io/gams-in-r-course/)

---

**Thank you for using the GAM-Based Malaria Analytics Platform (GAM-MAP)!**
